rationale: Both papers are 2005 JMR commentaries centered on the same core issue—bridging academic marketing research and practitioner/commercial practice—and the cited paper specifically discusses Johnson’s bridging role, which is directly aligned with the citing paper’s argument for closer ties. Given this strong thematic and likely discourse linkage, the citation is not clearly incidental even though only one DOI-level match is provided and no in-text snippet is available.
